lines.speaker: One Eyed Rosalee
lines.text: You're one to talk! I paid plenty for that little encounter!

lines.speaker: Captain Dawson
lines.text: One eye doesn't equal two of my best men!

lines.speaker: One Eyed Rosalee
lines.text: We gave you plenty of chances to flee!

lines.speaker: Captain Dawson
lines.text: If I ran away from you, I'd never hear the end of it!

lines.speaker: One Eyed Rosalee
lines.text: Really? Then what about that fight in the Turtle Belt?

lines.speaker: Captain Dawson
lines.text: That wasn't fleeing! It was a tactical repositioning! Besides, you're conveniently forgetting what happened at Brimhaven!

lines.speaker: One Eyed Rosalee
lines.text: A boring fight! I had better things to do.

lines.speaker: Captain Dawson
lines.text: Well, we'll have to make things more entertaining next time then!

lines.speaker: One Eyed Rosalee
lines.text: I look forward to it, but for now, let's drink!
